---
title: "ScoreMe"
subtitle: "Research questionnaire scorer"
description: "A lightweight web app for scoring validated research questionnaires in the browser. No installation required."
date: "2025-03-01"
image: ../images/scoreme_og.png
categories: [Web App, Questionnaires, Open Source]
---

## About

ScoreMe is a lightweight web app for scoring validated sleep and chronobiology questionnaires directly in the browser. No account, no installation, no data sent to any server — everything runs locally.

It is designed for clinicians and researchers who need a quick, reliable way to score questionnaires without setting up analysis software.

## Features

- Supports a growing library of validated instruments (PSQI, ESS, ISI, MEQ, and more)
- Instant scoring in the browser
- No installation or account required
- Fully open source

## Links

- 🌐 [Web app](https://scoreme.circadia-lab.uk)
- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/ScoreMe)
- 📦 [tallieR — R companion package](https://tallier.circadia-lab.uk)
